reviews.comment:
Dentro del ACA tiene muy buena atención, baños limpios y un espacio para tomar o comer con buenos precios. Aceptan Tarjetas.

(Translated by Google)
Inside the ACA, there's excellent service, clean bathrooms, and a place to eat or drink at reasonable prices. Credit cards are accepted.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.
Tendría que haber wifi en la playa para poder pagar con la app de YPF sin problema

(Translated by Google)
Good service. There should be Wi-Fi on the beach so we could pay with the YPF app without any problems.

reviews.comment:
En esta sucursal del Automovil Club es donde se puede hacer carga de gas para el aire acondicionado del auto entre 30 y 40 minutos. Es en el 1er piso, hay que anunciarse en la entrada de la rampa, en donde te piden el carnet. Tienen confiteria muy cómoda y que tiene de todo, en PB.

(Translated by Google)
This branch of the Automobile Club is where you can get your car's air conditioning recharged in 30 to 40 minutes. It's on the first floor; you need to announce yourself at the entrance ramp, where they'll ask for your membership card. They also have a very comfortable café on the ground floor with a wide variety of options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdHNURHJnRRAB
